LightningComponentBundle.description: A reusable multi-chart component supporting donut, pie, bar, column, line, area, sparkline, stacked, and heatmap charts built with native SVG.

property.name: chartType
property.label: Chart Type
property.description: Type of chart to display

property.name: chartSize
property.label: Chart Size (px)
property.description: Width AND height of the chart in pixels. Used when chartWidth/chartHeight are unset.

property.name: chartWidth
property.label: Chart Width (px)
property.description: Width override. Use this for rectangular charts (column timelines, sparklines).

property.name: chartHeight
property.label: Chart Height (px)
property.description: Height override. Use this for rectangular charts.

property.name: responsive
property.label: Responsive
property.description: When true, the chart fills 100% of its container's width. Height stays fixed.

property.name: donutThickness
property.label: Donut Thickness
property.description: Thickness of the donut ring (donut charts only)

property.name: chartTitle
property.label: Chart Title
property.description: Optional title displayed above the chart

property.name: palette
property.label: Color Palette
property.description: Named palette applied to data points that don't carry their own color.

property.name: noDataLabel
property.label: No-Data Label
property.description: Message rendered when chartData has no usable entries. Set blank to hide.

property.name: yAxisFormat
property.label: Y-Axis Format
property.description: Numeric formatter for axis labels and tooltips.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency Code
property.description: ISO currency code used when Y-Axis Format is 'currency'.

property.name: hideLegend
property.label: Hide Legend
property.description: Hide the legend below the chart

property.name: hidePercentages
property.label: Hide Percentages in Legend
property.description: Hide percentage values in the legend (circular charts only)

property.name: centerLabel
property.label: Center Label
property.description: Text to display in the center (donut/pie charts only)

property.name: centerValue
property.label: Center Value
property.description: Value to display in the center (donut/pie charts only)

property.name: hideDataPoints
property.label: Hide Data Points
property.description: Hide data points on line/area charts

property.name: hideGridLines
property.label: Hide Grid Lines
property.description: Hide grid lines on bar/column/line/area/stacked charts

property.name: chartDataJson
property.label: Chart Data (JSON)
property.description: JSON array: [{"label":"Name","value":100,"color":"#FF0000"}]. Stacked: [{"label":...,"segments":[{"name":...,"value":...}]}]. Heatmap: [{"row":0,"col":0,"value":5}]

property.name: hideLogo
property.label: Hide Logo
property.description: Hide the Sliick logo in the chart footer

property.name: chartType
property.label: Chart Type
property.description: Type of chart to display

property.name: chartSize
property.label: Chart Size (px)
property.description: Width and height of the chart in pixels

property.name: donutThickness
property.label: Donut Thickness
property.description: Thickness of the donut ring

property.name: chartTitle
property.label: Chart Title
property.description: Optional title displayed above the chart

property.name: hideLegend
property.label: Hide Legend
property.description: Hide the legend below the chart

property.name: hideDataPoints
property.label: Hide Data Points
property.description: Hide data points on line/area charts

property.name: hideGridLines
property.label: Hide Grid Lines
property.description: Hide grid lines

property.name: chartDataJson
property.label: Chart Data (JSON)
property.description: JSON array of data points

property.name: hideLogo
property.label: Hide Logo
property.description: Hide the Sliick logo in the chart footer
